headline: Biogen Expands Immunology Pipeline with Agreement to Acquire RayThera Inc.
summary: Acquisition adds multiple immunology assets to Biogen’s portfolio, including a lead asset poised to enter Phase 1 developmentCAMBRIDGE, Mass. and SAN DIEGO, June 17, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Biogen Inc. (Nasdaq: BIIB) and RayThera Inc., a private biotechnology company focused on discovering and developing small molecule therapies in immunology, today announced the companies have entered into a definitive agreement under which Biogen has agreed to acquire RayThera Inc. for up to $1 billion, consi
